Name: Pigeonhole Sort
Author: Harold H. Seward
Description: Pigeonhole sorting is a sorting algorithm that is suitable for sorting lists of elements where the number of elements and the number of possible key values are approximately the same. It requires O(n + Range) time where n is number of elements in input array and 'Range' is number of possible values in array.
Algorithm: async function sort(){let a=Math.min(...array);const r=Math.max(...array)-a+1,t=Array(r).fill(0);for(let r=0;r<array.length;r++)t[array[r]-a]++;let e=0;for(let l=0;l<r;l++)for(;t[l]-- >0;){await compare(array.indexOf(l+a),e);swap(array.indexOf(l+a),e++),await sleep(),firstRun=!1}}
